highlights_intro: Having completed this track, the candidate has demonstrated proficiency in learning to work effectively with AI by mastering the following core competencies.

highlights.title: Prompt and content engineering
highlights.desc: Crafting effective prompts and engineering content outputs.

highlights.title: Strategic AI application
highlights.desc: Deploying ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Grok for daily and professional workflows.

highlights.title: Operational integrity
highlights.desc: Implementing AI hygiene, privacy guardrails, and techniques to mitigate hallucinations.

highlights.title: Knowledge synthesis
highlights.desc: Using NotebookLM and RAG-based tools to manage information effectively.

highlights.title: Conceptual fluency
highlights.desc: Distinguishing AI agents from agentic AI, and navigating free versus paid tools.

closing_statement: This achievement reflects a commitment to continuous learning and readiness to apply artificial intelligence responsibly and effectively in the real world.
